claim: A 2021 Lancet review found prison TB rates 10-100x general population, HIV 2-10x higher, and fewer than 30 LMICs report prison health data to WHO.

source.title: Prison health and infectious disease control in LMICs: a systematic review

method: Reviewed systematic review methods, disease-burden estimates, and health-system integration analysis.
limitations: Prison health data is sparse and likely underestimates true burden.
Studies concentrated in a small number of countries.
